description: Professional wall plugs and screws for commercial or occasional home use Countersunk screw fasteners with raw plugs 6mm x 40mm screws + wall plugs Manufactured from steel for maximum strength and durability Brass plated for rust and corrosion resistance Perfect for a wide range of fixing needs in softwood, hardwood, MDF, timber, concrete, brick etc..
